title: Unified hard bank (local hard tasks + scored official SWE items)
description: One suite, one average: local hard discrimination tasks plus SWE-bench Verified instances that have a working official bridge path. External ids use prefix swebench: (resolved=100, not_resolved=0). Evaluator infrastructure failures and patch_missing are excluded from the mean, not counted as model zeros. Prefer flask (diagnostic) + pylint (hard ranking) which already have scorable evidence; do not hang on open-ended retries.
